title: Vietnamese Cha Buns
description: Delicious Vietnamese-style meatballs served in steamed buns, perfect for a quick snack or lunch.
instructions: Prepare the tofu by crumbling it into small pieces.
In a large mixing bowl, combine the tofu, Vietnamese Cha, and Briny Bun. Mix well.
Divide the mixture into 4-6 portions, depending on the size of your buns.
Shape each portion into a small ball and place them in the steamer.
Steam the cha buns for 8-10 minutes, or until they are cooked through.
Serve the cha buns in the Mindful Bun, garnished with additional Briny Bun if desired.
Enjoy as a snack or light meal.
